channel.title: Swalook Blog
channel.description: CRM, marketing, and growth insights for salon owners

item.title: Salon Marketing Guide India — How to Get More Clients Without Spending a Fortune
item.description: A complete salon marketing guide for Indian beauty businesses — Instagram, Google, WhatsApp, referrals, loyalty programs, and more.

item.title: Salon Billing Software Explained — GST, Commissions, and Clean Accounts
item.description: Everything Indian salon owners need to know about salon billing software — GST invoicing, payment tracking, staff commissions, and daily reconciliation.

item.title: How to Reduce Salon No-Shows in India — A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: No-shows are one of the biggest revenue problems for Indian salons. Here is a proven guide to reducing them.

item.title: Salon CRM vs Excel — Why Indian Salons Are Moving Away From Spreadsheets
item.description: Still tracking salon clients on Excel? See why Indian salons are switching to a CRM — and what it actually costs you to keep using spreadsheets.

item.title: How to Automate Your Salon Marketing with Swalook
item.description: A practical breakdown of automated campaigns, follow-ups, and reminders that save time and improve conversions.

item.title: Integrated Marketing for Salons with Swalook CRM
item.description: See how retention marketing, offers, and audience segmentation work together to improve repeat business.

item.title: Why Salons Need CRM Software: Swalook Solutions
item.description: Understand why manual operations stall growth and how a CRM can create a more organized, repeatable salon system.

item.title: 7 Key Factors When Choosing Salon CRM Software
item.description: A clean framework for comparing salon CRM tools based on retention, automation, reporting, and team workflow.
